message:
Expand integration tests: lowering coverage, parser AST traits, grammar backlog

lowering_coverage_integration.rs (+1374 lines): comprehensive IR1
lowering verification for all new statement and expression types —
Block, If/Else, For, ForIn, ForOf, While, DoWhile, Return, Throw,
TryCatch, Switch, Break, Continue, FunctionDeclaration. Verifies
correct Label/Jump/JumpIfFalsy emission, BinaryOp/UnaryOp/AssignOp
lowering, GetProperty/SetProperty, NewArray/NewObject, BeginTry/EndTry,
DeclareFunction, Throw, LoadThis, and Pop operations.

parser_trait_ast.rs (+673 lines): AST trait coverage for ForIn/ForOf
statement types, new expression variants, canonical_value round-trip
tests, span accessor verification.

parser_grammar_closure_backlog.json (+524 lines): expanded grammar
fixture corpus with for-in, for-of, template literal, new expression,
and arrow function test cases for metamorphic and property regression
suites.

parser_phase0_metamorphic.rs, parser_property_regression.rs: register
new grammar backlog fixtures.

attestation_safe_mode_fallback.rs, hook_effect_fallback_contract.rs,
obligation_integration.rs, rgc_test_harness_integration.rs,
runtime_observability.rs, semantic_twin_state_space.rs: minor test
adjustments for new statement/expression type handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
